sections.paragraph:
(“whom Jehovah judges,” i.e. whose cause he pleads), Jehoshaphat-

(1) king of Judah, 914-889 B. C., son of Asa, -1 Ki. 22:4151 , from whom the valley between Jerusalem and the Mount of Olives received its name [“although that is not expressly stated”], Joel 4:2 , 12 Joe 4:12 2Ch 20:1-37.-(2) the recorder of king David, 2Sa 8:16 20:24 .-(3) 1Ki 4:17.-(4) 2Ki 9:2, 14 2Ki 9:14.
